title: Prune dead planning list-files runtime delegate

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Advance #892 by removing the dead generated planning operation-executor handler and facade delegate for planning.list-files.report, which already executes through a direct generated command module.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not change planning.list-files behavior. Do not claim #892 completion. Regenerate generated outputs from command_package_ir rather than hand-editing them.

canonical_core.next_action: Remove planning.list-files.load handler wiring from command_package_ir, regenerate generated outputs, and prove the operation executor/facade no longer carry the dead delegate while the direct command remains present.
completion_criteria: planning.list-files.report remains excluded from generated/planning/python/primitives/operation_executor.py supported operation ids.
planning.list-files.load and load_planning_list_files_operation are absent from generated planning operation executor/facade.
generated/planning/python/commands/planning_list_files_report.py remains the direct generated command path.
The slice is archived as bounded runtime-debt reduction with #892 still open.
